notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.4. It addresses 22 CVEs: CVE-2025-39697, CVE-2024-26717, CVE-2024-35944, CVE-2024-35810, CVE-2024-26907, and 17 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
